gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the native factory diagnostics public API patch with no blocking findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_native_probe_factories.py -q -> 17 passed
what_changed: Added NATIVE_PROBE_FACTORIES_RECORD_TYPE to the curated native_probe_factories star-import surface and legacy compatibility wrapper.
Exposed NATIVE_PROBE_FACTORIES_RECORD_TYPE and write_builtin_native_probe_factories_record_json through the document_kv_cache and restaurant_kv_serving root facades.
Updated the Cachet type stub and public-package tests so typed branded imports match runtime facade exports.
why: Native factory diagnostics are a release-planning artifact; users should be able to import the record type and JSON writer from the same public API surfaces as the rest of the native adapter contract.
